claims.summary: Dynamic-noise and adaptive-pressure candidates should respond smoothly to gradient and pressure rather than jump at a threshold.
claims.disposition: Verified current helper source and tests for gentle, steep, pressured, and non-finite inputs.

claims.summary: The pressure-room slope needs an exact requested-point and boundary review.
claims.disposition: Verified the requested mid-pressure, pressure-room, and start-edge continuity tests.

claims.summary: Viscous-rho behavior needs exact entropy and gradient boundary tests.
claims.disposition: Verified ordinary, volatile-open, volatile-steep, already-viscous, fallback, and threshold-bound rho tests.

claims.summary: The prepared noise or rho candidate should be wired into the active ESN to create more room.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because wiring these helpers changes live reservoir noise, rho, and substrate mathematics.
